# PHIL.193 ? Automate and Eliminate

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** operating_principles
**Subcategory:** automate_and_eliminate
**Domain:** OPERATING_PRINCIPLES
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Automate repeatable work, eliminate unnecessary work entirely

## Application
Identify repetitive tasks, automate where possible, question necessity, eliminate waste
